description:
Advances: mutagen.cli

Deliverable:
- Fix the charlist/binary mismatch at `lib/mix/tasks/mutagen.ex:322` where `:code.add_pathz/1` is called with a binary path returned by `Mix.Local.archive_ebin/1`. OTP's `:code.add_pathz/1` requires a charlist. The exact fix is one of:
  - Wrap the binary in `to_charlist/1`: `:code.add_pathz(to_charlist(ebin))`
  - Or use `:code.add_pathsz/1` if available with binary support
- Pick the most idiomatic option matching the rest of the file's style.

Rationale (carved out from /orchestrate-epic of mutagen-wrd.40):
- S1 (mutagen-wrd.40.1) landed the runtime preamble repair and was unit-tested at the structured-error path and no-op-on-dep-adoption path. Both paths were green.
- S1's spec-r16 also requires that the success-after-self-heal path (scenario s14c) actually works end-to-end without leaking a traceback. S1 explicitly deferred that to S2's integration test.
- S2 (mutagen-wrd.40.2) shipped that end-to-end test and v11 stub flipped to execute:true. The test exercises the actual code path S1 wrote — including `:code.add_pathz/1` on the archive ebin returned by `Mix.Local.archive_ebin/1`.
- The end-to-end test exposes that `:code.add_pathz(ebin)` raises `FunctionClauseError` because ebin is a binary but `:code.add_pathz/1` requires a charlist. r16's MUST-NOT-leak-traceback clause is therefore violated, despite S1's unit tests passing.
- S2 cannot fix this — `lib/mix/tasks/mutagen.ex` is in S2's Out-of-Scope (files) list as "owned by S1". Carving this out as S1b (mutagen-wrd.40.4) is the correct routing per orchestrator-skill scope-expansion authority.

Spec touches:
- None — r16/s14c/v11 are already authored. This is purely a code defect against the existing contract.

Verification:
- Tests to pass: `mix test test/integration/archive_install_test.exs --include archive_integration` (the same v11 stub command S2 owns) must now run to completion AND assert PASS (mutagen_code == 0, aborted == false, mutation.total > 0).
- Mechanical: `mix compile --warnings-as-errors` clean; default lane smoke (`make smoke`) green.
- Spec validation: `mix spec.validate` is not available in this repo; substitute with `mix compile --warnings-as-errors` + the v11 stub.

Out of Scope (files):
- `test/integration/archive_install_test.exs` (already shipped by S2 at commit ae68d59c — do NOT modify; this stage validates against S2's existing test)
- `test/mix/tasks/mutagen_test.exs` (S1's unit tests — should still pass byte-identically after this fix)
- `README.md`, `CHANGELOG.md` (S3's territory; if a changelog mention is appropriate, leave that to a future polish ticket — do NOT touch in this stage)
- `mix.exs` (no aliases or dep edits needed)

Allowed touches:
- `lib/mix/tasks/mutagen.ex` (the one-line fix at or near line 322 — possibly minor adjacent edits if the same pattern appears at `:code.add_pathz/1` call sites within the runtime preamble repair code, e.g. if the same charlist-cast is needed elsewhere)
- `test/mix/tasks/mutagen_test.exs` (OPTIONAL — if a focused unit test on the charlist cast adds value beyond the integration test, add it here. The integration test in S2 is the primary coverage.)

Out of Scope (intent):
- No new third-party deps.
- No changes to the failure-tuple-gated detection predicate (`archive_context_failure?/1`).
- No changes to the structured-error path (already proven correct by S1's unit test).
- No changes to the public surface of `Mix.Tasks.Mutagen.run/1` or `run/2`.
- No changes to JsonReporter's abort_reason atom list — `:runtime_load_failed` is the only one and it was correctly used by S1.

Merge gate:
- [ ] `mix compile --warnings-as-errors` clean
- [ ] `mix test test/integration/archive_install_test.exs --include archive_integration` passes (the s14c success-after-self-heal scenario)
- [ ] `mix test test/mix/tasks/mutagen_test.exs --only archive_context` still passes (S1's unit tests unaffected)
- [ ] `make smoke` green
- [ ] Scope check: diff touches only Allowed globs
- [ ] Auditor APPROVE comment on the ticket

Blocks: mutagen-wrd.40.2 (cannot merge S2 until s14c is green; v11 is currently red on every run)
title: S1b: Charlist cast on :code.add_pathz in archive-context self-heal
